text:
Beauty Magnet Emerald (美を呼ぶエメラルド) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Beauty Magnet Emerald 美を呼ぶエメラルド - This card allows the user to summon forth a Beauty Magnet Emerald. This will unconditionally allow specialists offering beauty services to flock to its owner. As a result, the owner will shine with heretofore unrecognized beauty.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.077 :: 美を呼ぶエメラルド 
持ち主の周りには美の奉仕者が吸いよせられるように集まってくる。あなた自身も輝き、見違えるほど魅力的になれるだろう。
|-
![Eng]
|No.077 :: Beauty Magnet Emerald 
Bring together care-givers of beauty to the owners side like a magnet. You will shine and become very attractive, but also beyond recognition.
|}
